sections_cited: Section 37 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-3344 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.15040/2019 2. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2021 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Aqeel Ahmed, Advocate for the respondent Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi Deputy Attorney General ------------ Petitioner has impugned a notice/summon issued to the petitioner inviting him to submit evidence/documents under Section 37 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Perhaps while they were making scrutiny of the record such notice was issued which is challenged in this proceedings. Without commenting as to whether such notice was lawfully issued or otherwise petitioner’s counsel has failed to assist this court today to such extent and he is called absent. Even the petitioner’s representative are not in attendance, there is no intimation either. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
